g.text: HC4: Worker safety exposure — monsters affected by or responding to incidents
Human question: Which workers are repeatedly exposed to CDA incidents (as the
affected party or the responder)? Incidents must be visible at the person
level, not just the door level.
Returns: monster, times affected, times responder
# rdf:type/rdfs:subClassOf* matches Monster AND its subclasses (Comedian,
# DoorTechnician) without requiring a reasoner — so affected comedians appear.
